channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by SocioMétrica for El Español, 15–18 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
31 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by SocioMétrica for El Español, 15–18 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/spanish_ep_polls/2026-04-18-SocioMétrica.html
